general.wheelchair_seating: Wheelchair-accessible seating is available at every stadium. Companion seating is provided at no additional cost. Book accessible seating through the official FIFA ticket portal or contact the accessibility hotline.
general.elevators: Elevators are available at all major gates. During peak times, priority is given to wheelchair users and those with mobility impairments.
general.ramps: All gate entrances have wheelchair-accessible ramps. Concourse areas are fully accessible on every level.
general.sensory_room: Each stadium has at least one quiet/sensory room for fans with autism or sensory processing disorders. The room has reduced lighting, noise-dampening materials, and a live match feed.
general.companion_seating: One companion seat is provided at no extra charge with each wheelchair-accessible ticket.
general.hearing_loop: Induction hearing loops are installed in key areas including information desks, medical stations, and select seating sections.
general.braille_signage: Braille and tactile signage is available at all gate entrances, elevator landings, restrooms, and key wayfinding points.
general.service_animals: Certified service animals are welcome at all stadiums. Emotional support animals are NOT permitted. Relief areas for service animals are located near each gate entrance.
general.large_print: Large-print event programs and wayfinding guides are available at Information Desks near each gate.
general.sign_language: ASL/LSM interpreters are available upon request (48 hours advance notice). Contact the accessibility hotline.
general.mobility_aids: Wheelchairs and mobility scooters can be borrowed (subject to availability) from Medical Stations. A valid ID is required as deposit.
